description: Producer submits a first-version publish request (version=1, supersedes=null) but illegally includes a lineage_id field. Registry MUST reject with schema_violation (HTTP 400) per RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.2. Producers cannot supply a correct lineage_id for first versions because the formula is SHA-256(ctx_id) and ctx_id is registry-assigned. The acdp-publish-request.schema.json enforces this via an allOf clause.

input.notes: The body is otherwise well-formed. Only the presence of lineage_id alongside version=1 is the violation.
